9 Appendix: HPC Quick Reference 9.1 Overview This appendix provides a quick reference for common HPC commands and workflows. 9.2 SSH ssh username@ls6.tacc.utexas.edu 9.3 SLURM sbatch job.slurm squeue -u $USER scancel <jobid> 9.4 Modules module avail module load gcc module list 9.5 Compilation gcc program.c -o program -O2 g++ program.cpp -o program 9.6 MPI module load openmpi mpicc program.c -o program 9.7 OpenMP gcc -fopenmp program.c -o program export OMP_NUM_THREADS=4 9.8 Containers module load apptainer apptainer exec image.sif command 9.9 Key Idea Keep this file open as a reference while working on HPC systems.
